sender.notes: Soldier awaiting discharge; first name/surname not on these pages

letters.stationery: Army and Navy YMCA — With the Colors
letters.notes: Post-Armistice demobilization letter (April 1919). Page 1 is the dated greeting to Blanche; page 2 is the affectionate close. Filename stem 19190410bnpg suggests date + initials; confirm against envelope if available.
letters.reading:
April 10, 1919

Dearest Darling Blanche,

I received your letter that you wrote Tuesday yesterday morning about nine o'clock, and it was stamped at 8:30 Tuesday night in Nashville, so it sure did make a quick trip, didn't it.

We passed our exam yesterday and signed our discharges and also the payroll last night, and they say we will get our discharge and all out if nothing happens. I sure hope we get them soon that morning so I can catch #2 or the [?train].

Please fly out so I can get to Nashville — so we can be together Saturday night and go out home Sunday. Just think: only a few more days and then we can look each other in the face and just keep on loving each other, and not have to be worrying about when we have to part again.

Oh honey, I just want you to always love me, and when I am tired or feeling bad I will be perfectly happy if you will just put your arms around me and kiss me.

Oh Honey I just want
you to always love
me and when I am
tired or feeling bad I
will be perfectly happy
if you will just put
your arms [?a]round me and
kiss me.

sender.notes: User identified writer as uncle Franny; family-tree top box reads Frans

recipient.notes: General family update / circular, not a single addressed recipient

letters.notes: Modern family circular by Uncle Franny (not WWI). Opens with family tree (Frans & Nancy → Lea, Auko, Ingrid, Jorgen) then geographic updates: California, Texas, Missouri, then East Coast (New Haven, Cape Cod, Boston). Excellent HTR test case: high contrast, clear headings, dense proper nouns.
letters.reading:
…What family is all about

A brief description follows with names, updates and locations…

Family tree: Frans & Nancy → Lea (Frans, Nicole, Rachel), Auko (Frans), Ingrid, Jorgen (Taylor).

California — Ingrid, formerly in advertising in Los Angeles and Japan with Japan Airlines, now works as a vet technician in Simi Valley (prefers larger animals). Her Jack Russell Terrier is “Little Bear.” Leslie and daughter Taylor jog in Santa Monica. Jorgen balances legal work at Toyota with travel to Japan and hands-on house projects (tools and cacti). Dogs “Big Blue” and “Buffie” (Bouvier des Flandres) welcome little Taylor (Scottie).

On to Texas — “Big Bob” is #1 company representative in the USA and has a talent for the Texas Two Step. Lea does interior design for retirement living facilities in Japan. Rachel shines as a “Star Duster” at junior sports events and senior centers around Austin. Heidi (Dutch Keeshond) and three rabbits round out the household.

Up in Missouri — Big Frans is comfortable in a red enameled Adirondack chair of his own design. Fiancée Lorna claims the longest rambling ivy west of the Mississippi. They celebrated their engagement at the Racquet Club in St. Louis; both practice law (Frans in St. Louis, Lorena in Springfield, Illinois). A kitten from Texas is a new addition.

East Coast — New Haven: Nicole and Eugene are immersed in Yale life; Nicole is with the Yale Endowment Office; after the engagement party they plan Cape Cod, then Mexico City and Acapulco to see Eugene’s family. Cape Cod: Frans Jr. (Aako) juggles work with culinary school in Boston (“Chef de Cuisine”); Laurie rode in the Boston–New York AIDS Bicycle Ride. Boston: another Frans (HoTo) works as a film gaffer; Patricia is an admissions counselor at Emmanuel College (and an excellent salsa dancer); they share life with Siberian Huskies Grindle and Cleo and travel widely.

---
Editorial notes: Light punctuation normalization. Some nicknames/spellings remain uncertain (Auko/Aako, Lorna/Lorena, HoTo, Laurie/Lennie). Diagram names transcribed from the family tree boxes.

pages.diplomatic:
. . . What family is all about

[Family tree diagram — top right]
  Frans — Nancy
    ├─ Lea → Frans, Nicole, Rachel
    ├─ Auko → Frans
    ├─ Ingrid
    └─ Jorgen → Taylor

A brief description follows
with names, updates and locations . . .

California
Ingrid who worked in advertising in
Los Angeles and Japan with Japan Airlines
now works as a vet-technician in Simi
Valley. She has a preference for larger
animals. "Little Bear", never one to be
intimidated by size . . . agrees. He's a
Jack Russel Terrier.
Leslie and daughter Taylor can be spotted
on their daily jogging routine in Santa
Monica. Jorgen balances his legal
profession at Toyota and travels to Japan
with hands-on work around the house. His
speciality combines exotic projects, tools
and cacti. "Big Blue and Buffie" (Bouvier
de Flandres) are happy to have little
Taylor (Scottie) as a new member of the
family.

On to Texas
"Big Bob" has been discovered to have a
talent for the "Texas Two Step" in addition
to being #1 Representative of his Company
in the entire USA. Lea is doing well in
her field of Interior Design for Retirement
Living Facilities in Japan. Rachel does
well in school and shines as a "Star
Duster" at junior sports events and Senior
Citizen Centers in the Austin metropolitan
area. Heidi a Dutch Keeshond and three
rabbits round out the family.

up in Missouri
Big Frans is quite comfortable in a red
enameled Adirondack Chair of his own design
and making. Lorna his fiancée can lay claim
to the longest rambling ivy west of the
Mississippi.

Missouri Continued
They recently celebrated their engagement
at the Racquet Club in St. Louis. Each are
practicing lawyers.. Frans in St. Louis and
Lorena in Springfield Illinois. Their kitten
from Texas (Guess from who) is a new addition
to the household.

Moving to the East Coast

New Haven:
Nicole and Eugene find their lives pretty
much involved with the many opportunities
Yale has to offer. After their travel to
St. Louis for Frans and Lorena's engagement
party they now look forward to visiting
Cape Cod.. then Mexico City and Acapulco
to visit Eugene's family. Nicole is with
the Yale Endowment Office.

Cape Cod
Frans Jr. (Aako) is now fully occupied
juggling his work in Cape Cod and classes
at the Cambridge School of Culinary Arts
in Boston where he will graduate as "Chef
de Cuisine". Laurie provides an extra
dimension to the picture. She recently made
family history by participating in the
Annual New York ^Bicycle AIDS Ride from
Boston to New York. [?Laurie/Lennie]'s
biggest thrill... pedalling down 5th Avenue!

Boston
Another Frans (HoTo) has his hands full
with his chosen career in the Film Making
Industry as a gaffer (lighting). An
independent, he has fortunately been kept
busy and his network of contacts continues
to grow. Patricia is an Admissions Counselor
at Emmanuel College in Boston (She is an
excellent Salsa Dancer) They share their
time with "Grindle and Cleo", Siberian
Huskies. Frans and Patricia travel
extensively, both stateside and Latin
America.
